title: Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates:
Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates!
